summary: End-to-end testing of Bongo Control (Tesla-style van cockpit PWA). Backend: 26/26 pytest cases pass covering telemetry snapshot, WebSocket streaming (/api/ws/telemetry), mission brief, POI+AI nearby, weather forecast (Open-Meteo passthrough + stub fallback), auth unlock, camera snapshot (locked & unlocked), history for all 4 domains x 4 ranges, wifi status/scan/connect, plugins, tunnel and settings persistence. Frontend: 42/42 data-testid checks pass across all 7 screens (Dashboard, SITREP, Nearby, Weather, Camera, History, Settings), WebSocket LIVE indicator lights up, camera unlock flow with password 'bongo' works and snapshot capture appends to strip, history range toggles switch data, mobile bottom tab bar renders at <768px. No functional issues found.

issues: Non-blocking recharts warning at initial mount: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'. Chart renders correctly after layout settles; consider giving ResponsiveContainer parent a minHeight to silence.

action_items: (Optional polish) Silence recharts ResponsiveContainer initial (-1,-1) warnings by giving chart wrappers explicit minHeight.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: MongoDB client is instantiated but unused for these features (documented as intentional in the file header) — fine for this MVP.

server.py: WebSocket `/api/ws/telemetry` is registered directly on `app` (not on `api_router`) which is correct because APIRouter does not support websocket route prefixing cleanly; the /api prefix is manually included in the path for ingress. Verified working.
server.py uses on_event('startup'/'shutdown') which is deprecated in FastAPI in favour of lifespan handlers — works but consider migration.

camera_snapshot receives the unlock token via query param (?token=...) — acceptable for a synthesized frame but note: standard practice is Authorization header. The frontend uses query param because tags can't set headers, so this is a reasonable trade-off.
server.py is 620 lines — approaching the 700-line threshold; splitting into modules (telemetry, poi, weather, camera, wifi, settings) would improve maintainability.
ws.js hook: reconnect backoff scheduler correctly guards against multiple parallel reconnects via retryRef and closedRef — good.
api.js: fails fast if REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is undefined (no fallback), which matches project guidance.
test_credentials: Camera unlock password: 'bongo' (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Confirmed working via POST /api/auth/unlock -> {token, expires_in}.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and cover all endpoints listed in the PRD. Reuse them as regression suite. Frontend testids are centralized in /app/frontend/src/constants/testIds/index.js — always source selectors from there. WebSocket path is /api/ws/telemetry (registered on `app` directly, not `api_router`).
